# STRAT.024 ? Flow State (Csikszentmihalyi)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Challenge-skill balance; clear goals; immediate feedback; complete absorption; time distortion; intrinsic motivation

## Application
Match challenge to skill; set clear goals; create feedback loops; eliminate distractions; find intrinsic motivation; optimize difficulty

## Key Values
- Challenge-skill balance
- Absorption
- Clear goals
- Feedback
- Intrinsic motivation

philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks
